sections.paragraph: διαταγή, ῆς, ἡ [δια, ταγή (‘an orderly quantity or arrangement’, such as a ‘battle line’, then of an authoritative declaration that effects the orderly objective: ‘command’ = διατάξις) fr. τάσσω] directive, ordinance Ro 13:2.—εἰς διαταγὰς ἀγγέλων as ordinances transmitted through angels Ac 7:53.
